ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "hgnc_id" TEXT /* HGNC ID of the gene */,
  "gene_url" TEXT /* URL to the gene's information page */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome number where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_label" TEXT /* Label of the disease */,
  "mondo_id" TEXT /* MONDO ID of the disease */,
  "disease_url" TEXT /* URL to the disease's information page */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* Type of disease */,
  "age_of_onset" TEXT /* Typical age range when symptoms of the disease first appear */,
  "prevalence" TEXT /* Estimated prevalence of the disease in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_disease_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene-disease association */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "mode_of_inheritance" TEXT /* Mode of inheritance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the association */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association between the gene and disease */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Measure of the confidence in the association */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Reference to the publication or study that established the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_disease_associations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_disease_associations_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dosage_haploinsufficiency" (
  "assertion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each haploinsufficiency assertion */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "assertion_date" TEXT /* Date of the assertion */,
  "evidence_level" TEXT /* Level of evidence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assertion */,
  "assertion_report" TEXT /* URL to the assertion report */,
  "dosage_type" TEXT /* Type of dosage effect */,
  "dosage_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dosage effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assertion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dosage_haploinsufficiency_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dosage_haploinsufficiency_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dosage_triplosensitivity" (
  "assertion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each triplosensitivity assertion */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "assertion_date" TEXT /* Date of the assertion */,
  "evidence_level" TEXT /* Level of evidence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assertion */,
  "assertion_report" TEXT /* URL to the assertion report */,
  "dosage_type" TEXT /* Type of dosage effect */,
  "dosage_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dosage effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assertion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dosage_triplosensitivity_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dosage_triplosensitivity_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_disease_validity" (
  "assertion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene-disease validity assertion */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "assertion_date" TEXT /* Date of the assertion */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the assertion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assertion */,
  "assertion_report" TEXT /* URL to the assertion report */,
  "validity_type" TEXT /* Type of validity assertion */,
  "validity_confidence" TEXT /* Measure of the confidence in the validity assertion */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of evidence supporting the validity assertion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assertion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_disease_validity_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_disease_validity_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actionability" (
  "assertion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actionability assertion */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "assertion_date" TEXT /* Date of the assertion */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the assertion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assertion */,
  "assertion_report" TEXT /* URL to the assertion report */,
  "actionability_type" TEXT /* Type of actionability assertion */,
  "actionability_confidence" TEXT /* Measure of the confidence in the actionability assertion */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Description of the clinical significance of the actionability assertion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assertion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actionability_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actionability_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene-disease association being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the association */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the gene-disease association */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the gene-disease association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES gene_disease_associations ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene-disease association being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES gene_disease_associations ("association_id")
)
